preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Analytics Laboratory' AND is_template = true

column.name: title
column.value: Analytics Laboratory

column.name: objective
column.value: Complete bioanalytical and pharmaceutical analysis workflow

column.name: protocol
column.value: Standard Analytics Laboratory Protocol

column.name: content
column.value: Analytics Laboratory notebook template for bioanalytical and pharmaceutical analysis including sample creation, metadata capture, and test assignment.

changeSet.author: openelis-analytics

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Analytics Laboratory' AND is_template = true
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook_page np JOIN clinlims.notebook n ON np.notebook_id = n.id WHERE n.title = 'Analytics Laboratory' AND n.is_template = true AND np.page_order = 1

changeSet.comment: Create Sample Creation and Full Metadata Capture page for Analytics Laboratory notebook

column.name: title
column.value: Sample Creation & Full Metadata Capture

column.name: instructions
column.value: Create the analytical sample as the primary entity and register it for bioanalytical or pharmaceutical analysis. Capture all sample metadata including: Sample Identity (Identifier, Barcode/QR code, Source - Medical Laboratory/Researcher/External client), Sample Category (Bioanalytical/Pharmaceutical analysis), Sample Type (API/Tablet/Capsule/Suspension/Injection/Cream-ointment/Processed biological sample/Other), Sample Context (Requesting unit, Requested tests - multi-select, Study/Project ID), Storage and Handling (Storage condition, Received date/time, Received by). System generates label and sets status to 'Created - Pending Test Assignment'.

column.name: content
notebook_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Analytics Laboratory' AND is_template = true)

delete.where: notebook_id = (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Analytics Laboratory' AND is_template = true) AND page_order = 1

changeSet.author: openelis-analytics

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Analytics Laboratory' AND is_template = true
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook_page np JOIN clinlims.notebook n ON np.notebook_id = n.id WHERE n.title = 'Analytics Laboratory' AND n.is_template = true AND np.page_order = 2

changeSet.comment: Create Test Assignment and Preparation page for Analytics Laboratory notebook

column.name: title
column.value: Test Assignment & Preparation

column.name: instructions
column.value: Assign responsibility and select analytical methods per sample. For Personnel Assignment: select assigned role (Chemical Analyst/Pharmacist/Researcher), enter assigned analyst name, and set assignment date. For Method Selection: choose analytical methodology from multi-select options (HPLC, UV-Vis, LC-MS/MS, Dissolution USP I/II, Hardness test, Friability test, Disintegration test, Identity test). System creates worklist and updates status to 'Assigned - Ready for Analysis'.

column.name: content
notebook_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Analytics Laboratory' AND is_template = true)

delete.where: notebook_id = (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Analytics Laboratory' AND is_template = true) AND page_order = 2

changeSet.author: openelis-analytics

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Analytics Laboratory' AND is_template = true
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook_page np JOIN clinlims.notebook n ON np.notebook_id = n.id WHERE n.title = 'Analytics Laboratory' AND n.is_template = true AND np.page_order = 3

changeSet.comment: Create Analysis / Test Execution page for Analytics Laboratory notebook

column.name: title
column.value: Analysis / Test Execution

column.name: instructions
column.value: Perform analytical testing while preserving data integrity. Record: Test start date and time, Instrument used, Method reference/SOP, Analyst performing test. For Chromatographic/Spectroscopic tests (HPLC/UV-Vis/LC-MS/MS): Run ID, System suitability status, Calibration status, Raw data file reference. For Physical tests - Dissolution: Apparatus type (USP I/II), RPM, Medium, Time points. For Hardness/Friability/Disintegration: Individual values, Average, Acceptance decision. System attaches raw data and sets status to 'Analysis Completed - Pending Review'.

column.name: content
notebook_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Analytics Laboratory' AND is_template = true)

delete.where: notebook_id = (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Analytics Laboratory' AND is_template = true) AND page_order = 3

changeSet.author: openelis-analytics

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Analytics Laboratory' AND is_template = true
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook_page np JOIN clinlims.notebook n ON np.notebook_id = n.id WHERE n.title = 'Analytics Laboratory' AND n.is_template = true AND np.page_order = 4

changeSet.comment: Create Result Review, Reporting and Release page for Analytics Laboratory notebook

column.name: title
column.value: Result Review, Reporting & Release

column.name: instructions
column.value: Validate and release analytical results. For Review and Validation: Record Reviewed by (name), Review date, Compliance with specification (Pass/Fail), Comments. For Reporting: Generate Analytical Result Report, Record report version, Select release recipients (Requesting unit, Researcher, Client). System locks results after approval, finalizes audit trail, and sets status to 'Results Released'.

column.name: content
notebook_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Analytics Laboratory' AND is_template = true)

delete.where: notebook_id = (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Analytics Laboratory' AND is_template = true) AND page_order = 4

changeSet.author: openelis-analytics

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Analytics Laboratory' AND is_template = true
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook_page np JOIN clinlims.notebook n ON np.notebook_id = n.id WHERE n.title = 'Analytics Laboratory' AND n.is_template = true AND np.page_order = 5

changeSet.comment: Create Post-Test Sample and Data Handling page for Analytics Laboratory notebook

column.name: title
column.value: Post-Test Sample & Data Handling

column.name: instructions
column.value: Manage retention, biorepository transfer, and long-term traceability. For Sample Retention: Record if retention is required (Yes/No), Retention quantity, Retention duration (Stability study/Legal hold/Protocol-defined). For Biorepository Transfer: Record if transfer required (Yes/No), Transfer date, Receiving laboratory, Storage condition. For Data Handling: Mark raw data as archived, Final reports archived, Record retention period. System marks sample lifecycle as Completed and preserves records for compliance.

column.name: content
notebook_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Analytics Laboratory' AND is_template = true)

delete.where: notebook_id = (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Analytics Laboratory' AND is_template = true) AND page_order = 5

changeSet.author: openelis-analytics

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.workflow_page_template WHERE workflow_category = 'ANALYTICS'

changeSet.comment: Insert predefined Analytics workflow page templates

column.name: name
column.value: Sample Creation & Full Metadata Capture

column.name: description
column.value: Create the analytical sample and register it for bioanalytical or pharmaceutical analysis

column.name: default_instructions
column.value: Capture sample identity (identifier, barcode, source), category (bioanalytical/pharmaceutical), type (API/Tablet/Capsule/etc.), context (requesting unit, requested tests, study ID), and storage handling (condition, received date/time, received by). System generates label and sets status.

column.name: default_content
column.value: Sample Creation and Full Metadata Capture - Initial screen for Analytics Laboratory

column.name: name
column.value: Test Assignment & Preparation

column.name: description
column.value: Assign responsibility and select analytical methods per sample

column.name: default_instructions
column.value: Assign personnel (role, analyst name, date) and select analytical methodology (HPLC, UV-Vis, LC-MS/MS, Dissolution, Hardness test, Friability test, Disintegration test, Identity test). Supports bulk assignment.

column.name: default_content
column.value: Test Assignment and Preparation - Analyst and method assignment for Analytics Laboratory

column.name: name
column.value: Analysis / Test Execution

column.name: description
column.value: Perform analytical testing while preserving data integrity

column.name: default_instructions
column.value: Record test execution details (start time, instrument, method/SOP, analyst). For chromatographic tests: Run ID, system suitability, calibration status, raw data reference. For physical tests: apparatus type, RPM, medium, time points, individual values, average, acceptance decision.

column.name: default_content
column.value: Analysis / Test Execution - Perform and document analytical testing

column.name: name
column.value: Result Review, Reporting & Release

column.name: description
column.value: Validate and release analytical results

column.name: default_instructions
column.value: Review and validate results (reviewed by, date, compliance, comments). Generate and release reports (report version, release recipients). System locks results and finalizes audit trail.

column.name: default_content
column.value: Result Review, Reporting and Release - Validate and release analytical results

column.name: name
column.value: Post-Test Sample & Data Handling

column.name: description
column.value: Manage retention, biorepository transfer, and long-term traceability

column.name: default_instructions
column.value: Record sample retention requirements (quantity, duration). Document biorepository transfer (date, receiving lab, conditions). Archive raw data and final reports. System marks lifecycle complete and preserves records.

column.name: default_content
column.value: Post-Test Sample and Data Handling - Manage retention and archiving
